name: Collins, Samuel
intel:
^Visual profile:^
*Identifying Marks:* Extensive |sleeve tattoos| on |right arm|, likely acquired post-discharge. Visible scarring from his time in Marshall Prison.

*Tactical Preference:* Outdated, analog weaponry. Known to keep a |high-gauge pump-action shotgun| on-site at his residence, alongside various handguns.

*Visual Profile:* Often seen in civilian flannel and workwear. Actively avoids modernized tactical gear or ECAF-issued equipment.

*First Seen:* May 2031 – NATO Broadcast / UEJTF Operation Unknown Entity Formation.

*Last Seen:* October 2047 – NewLake City, Utah (Currently under ECAF Level 5 Surveillance at his civilian residence/shooting range).

^Biography:^
Samuel Collins is a |former Tier-1 Specialist| and |highly volatile| hostile asset. Collins originally served in the USMC alongside Founder Rodriguez prior to Rodriguez's transfer to the Navy SEALs. The two were reunited when Collins was selected for UEJTF Team 11 (OP-Unknown Entity). His inclusion was based on |extreme physical agility| and a highly recognized, aggressive determination—intel noted that once assigned an objective, Collins possessed a near-pathological drive to complete it. 


[IMG:data:image/jpeg;base64,]

^Psychological Profile & Radicalization:^

During OP-UE, Collins began exhibiting severe anti-establishment paranoia. Intelligence intercepts from his time on Team 11 show a growing delusion that global governments and NATO command were inherently corrupt. Despite his physical capabilities, official UEJTF command reports (submitted by team leadership) |downgraded his performance to "Adequate,"| citing a severe lack of discipline and deteriorating team cohesion. ||Collins developed a specific, unsubstantiated fixation on Founder Rodriguez||, accusing him of manipulating ||Unknown Entity Joint task force's|| objectives.

^The Mutiny (2031):^
When NATO officially suspended the investigation into the target known as ||"Ash"||, Collins fully radicalized. Bypassing the chain of command, ||he illegally mobilized a splinter cell of operators he deemed "trustworthy" to conduct an unsanctioned, rogue hunt for the target. This mutiny directly led to the catastrophic facility explosion in Kazakhstan.||

^<ochre>TRANSCRIPT LOG: NATO JOINT MILITARY TRIBUNAL [CLASSIFIED]<ochre>^

*<ochre>DATE:<ochre>* 14 NOV 2031
*<ochre>SUBJECT:<ochre>* COLLINS, SAMUEL. MSGT, USMC / UEJTF TEAM 11
*<ochre>PRESIDING:<ochre>* COLONEL T. HARRINGTON (JAG), MAJOR M. NOVAK (LIAISON)

*<ochre>[RECORDING COMMENCES]<ochre>*

<red>COL. HARRINGTON:<red> Master Sergeant Collins, you have waived your right to preliminary counsel. I will state for the record that this board finds your decision highly ill-advised given the severity of the charges.

<blue>MSGT. COLLINS:<blue> Read them, Colonel. Let’s get it over with.

<red>COL. HARRINGTON:<red> Very well. You are formally charged under the Uniform Code of Military Justice with the following: Article 92, Disobeying a direct order from a superior commissioned officer. Article 121, Larceny of military property, specifically Class-V ordnance and transport vehicles. Article 134, Endangerment of a non-combatant...

<blue>MSGT. COLLINS:<blue> (Interrupting) I didn’t endanger the kid. I pulled him out of the blast radius.

<red>COL. HARRINGTON:<red> Master Sergeant, Captain Rodriguez’s official After-Action Report explicitly states you utilized the local national, Nirvan Shwani, as human cover to secure your own extraction during the Rozhia engagement.

<blue>MSGT. COLLINS:<blue> Rodriguez is a liar. He wasn't even in the blast zone.

<red>COL. HARRINGTON:<red> Captain Rodriguez’s combat record is immaculate, Collins. Yours, currently, reads like a psychological break. Which brings us to the most severe charge. Article 119, Manslaughter. Through gross negligence and unauthorized deployment to the Kazakhstan border, you directly caused the deaths of three NATO operatives: Specialist , Staff Sergeant Gavalas, and Contractor Seale.

<blue>MSGT. COLLINS:<blue> We found the development site. ||Ash was there. They were building the core—. Hugh knew it. He let those men die to bury the evidence.||

<red>COL. HARRINGTON:<red> (Sighs audibly) Master Sergeant... Allied Intelligence swept the ||Kazakhstan blast crater. It was an abandoned Soviet-era refinery. There was no core.|| There was no research facility. There was only you, stealing a vacuum bomb and dropping a concrete ceiling on your own team.

<blue>MSGT. COLLINS:<blue> (Silence. Audio picks up shifting chains)

<red>COL. HARRINGTON:<red> Your commanding officer requested leniency, citing severe combat fatigue. That is the only reason the prosecution is not seeking a life sentence at Leavenworth.

<blue>MSGT. COLLINS:<blue> ||Hugh asked for leniency. Of course he did. He needs me alive to know he won.||

<green>MAJOR NOVAK:<green> ||Sam. Shut up. Take the deal.||

<blue>MSGT. COLLINS:<blue> (Pause) ||Three years in Marshall. That’s the deal?||

<green>MAJOR NOVAK:<green> Yes.

<blue>MSGT. COLLINS:<blue> You read the file, Major?

<green>MAJOR NOVAK:<green> I read the file.

<blue>MSGT. COLLINS:<blue> ||Then you know what he is.|| (To the board) I plead guilty. Lock me up. ||But when he turns whatever he found in that 'empty' crater on you... don't say nobody warned you.||

*<ochre>[RECORDING TERMINATED]<ochre>*

^Current Status:^
Court-martialed for insubordination, theft of military assets, and extreme negligence, Collins served three years in Marshall Prison. He now resides in NewLake City under a civilian cover. Collins is considered a <red>Level 5 Threat<red>; he remains a highly capable, radicalized operator who still harbors his UETF-era delusions regarding Founder Rodriguez and ECAF.

name: Anton Yuriyovych Kovalov
aff: NASU / National Academy of Sciences of Ukraine
intel:
^GEAR / MARKS^
*Visual Aid:* Wears |vintage wire-rimmed glasses| (left lens slightly cracked in footage).
*Marks:* Small surgical |scar on right wrist| (carpal tunnel surgery). No known tattoos.
*Attire (Last Seen):* Grey wool trench coat, checkered button-down shirt, navy trousers, brown leather satchel (contents likely classified research notes).
*Tech:* Known to carry ||an encrypted hard drive (IronKey)|| on a lanyard around his neck. It was not visible in the security footage, suggesting it may have been confiscated by "Ash".

^First Sighted:^
*2100 hours, Lviv International Airport* (LWO), Terminal A Drop-off.
Subject exited a taxi alone.

^Last Sighted:^
2315 hours, LWO Tarmac, Gate 04 (Private Aviation Sector).
|Status: KIDNAPPED / IN TRANSIT.|
*Context:* Subject was flagged by facial recognition while being escorted across the tarmac by |two hostile entities (Suspect 1: "Ash"; Suspect 2: Unidentified Asian Male/Poss. ||Dmitry Han||)|. Subject appeared disoriented, possibly sedated. Boarded an unmarked Gulfstream G650. Transponder was disabled immediately after takeoff.

[IMG:data:image/jpeg;base64,]


^BIOGRAPHY^
Anton Kovalov is a generational intellect in the field of condensed matter physics. A prodigy from Kharkiv, he completed his doctorate at age 22. His early career was marked by collaborative fellowships at CERN and the Max Planck Institute, where he was lauded for his work on particle stability.

In 2028, Kovalov returned to Kyiv to lead a specialized research unit at NASU. His focus shifted to high-yield energy states in liquid vacuums. His 2029 publication on the subject was controversial; while mathematically sound, critics argued the physical application was impossible. Kovalov vehemently defended the work before abruptly withdrawing from public academic life in late 2030.

^POST-MORTEM SUMMARY^
Professor Anton Kovalov was a distinguished physicist whose theoretical work on |Aerosolized State Dynamics| became the unintended catalyst for a new generation of terror weapons.

In late May 2031, NATO forces interdicted a shipment of IEDs that utilized a binary compound usually considered inert. Analysis suggested the compounds could only be weaponized under extreme, specific pressure conditions — physics that Kovalov had unknowingly perfected in his 2029 papers on ||"condensed matter stability"|| alongside other INTEL found at the scene, labeled as E.N.T.I — believed to be an abbreviation of a bio-hazard compound used in the thermobaric bombs.

Kovalov was abducted on 20 May 2031 by a specialized retrieval team led by *ASH*. He was transported via private jet to a remote facility in Armenia. There, under the supervision of local criminal Arman Khachaturian [believed to be <ASH>], Kovalov was forced to engineer a dispersal mechanism for a Next-Gen Thermobaric "Vacuum" Bomb. The weapon was designed to bypass conventional armor by creating a pressure wave capable of rupturing internal organs without destroying infrastructure.

Kovalov resisted the engineering process, delaying the weapon's completion by days — a delay that allowed NATO intelligence to track the thermal signature of the testing site.

Although the extraction team successfully breached the facility, Kovalov was mortally wounded by his captors during the firefight. He remained conscious long enough to provide the encryption key to his research, ensuring the weapon design died with him.

^Physical Description^

*Apparent Ethnicity:* Light-skinned / Caucasian (based on limited right-profile visibility).

*Attire:* Dark brown or black leather bomber-style jacket, standard blue denim jeans, dark footwear. Wearing a light grey or faded olive tactical-style baseball cap pulled low to obscure facial features.

*Accessories:* Holding a dark, rectangular object (likely a mobile device or comms unit) in his left hand.

[IMG:data:image/jpeg;base64,]

^Body Marks^

Unknown. No visible tattoos, scars, or identifying marks discernible from the current rear/profile angle.

^Biography^

Operational Role: Extractor / Escort.

Operating in coordination with Suspect 2 (Unidentified Asian Male).

^Last Seen^

*Timestamp:* 2315 hours.
*Location:* LWO Tarmac, Gate 04 (Private Aviation Sector).
*Activity:* Captured via surveillance escorting a flagged, disoriented/sedated subject across the tarmac. Subject "Ash" was positioned on the subject's left flank.

*Status:* <red>IN TRANSIT / FLIGHT RISK<red>. Boarded an unmarked Gulfstream G650. Aircraft transponder went dark immediately after takeoff.

^Medical Evaluation^

No visible injuries or physical impairments. Posture and gait suggest full mobility and physical capability necessary for forced extraction and suspect control.


^Other Intel^

Known Associates: Suspect 2 (Unidentified Asian Male wearing dark quilted jacket).

*Assets:* Access to private aviation network (unmarked Gulfstream G650) and capability to bypass or spoof standard airport security protocols.

*Next Action:* Prioritize tracking radar anomalies matching a G650 departing LWO airspace post-2315 hours.

name: Seale, Liam
intel:
^Physical Description^
*General:* Tall endurance-built male with long-limbed sniper physiology. Maintains controlled posture and steady stance even during prolonged overwatch positions. Frequently seen wearing cold-weather field gear and civilian outerwear during non-uniform deployments.
*Hair:* Short red hair; typically concealed under field caps or beanies.
*Eyes:* Green; noted by observers for steady gaze and intense focus during targeting.
*Facial Features:* Light freckles across cheeks and nose. Several minor facial scars including |healed fracture scar across nasal bridge| and |thin laceration beneath left eye|.
*Presence:* Appears calm and conversational even in high-threat environments. Known to casually speak or joke moments before taking a shot.
[IMG:data:image/jpeg;base64,]

[IMG:data:image/jpeg;base64,]

^Body Marks^
*Scars:* Healed fracture mark across nose consistent with blunt trauma injury during field operation or detention altercation.
*Additional Marks:* Small facial scar beneath left eye. Minor knuckle scarring recorded from earlier incarceration period.
*Distinguishing Traits:* Often wears practical civilian clothing layered over tactical armor during covert deployments.

^Biography^
Liam "Orka" Seale was born in Manchester, United Kingdom, and spent his early life in an environment heavily influenced by organized street crime. At sixteen he became involved in a robbery that escalated into a hostage incident inside a retail store. During the event Seale discharged multiple rounds from a pistol across the street into the storefront. Numerous casualties resulted; however ballistic reconstruction could not definitively attribute every fatal shot to him. The incident earned him the prison nickname "Killer Orka" due to the unusually high hit rate recorded under chaotic conditions.

[IMG:data:image/jpeg;base64,]

While incarcerated, behavioral analysts connected to ||UK intelligence services|| flagged Seale after reviewing ballistic and psychological data from the incident. Observers noted an abnormally calm neurological response during lethal engagement and extremely high hit probability with minimal training. Following extended evaluation, Seale was quietly removed from the prison system under a classified national security directive and transferred into a covert sniper development program.

Between 2028 and 2030 Seale underwent extensive training in long-range marksmanship, reconnaissance overwatch, and counter-sniper doctrine. He was subsequently embedded as a deniable British precision asset within multinational operations supporting NATO mission structures.

Operators who worked with Seale consistently described him as relaxed and sarcastic during operations, often making dry remarks over comms even during active engagements. Despite the humor, his shot discipline and situational awareness were regarded as elite.

^Last Seen^
Date: 13 NOV 2031
Location: Rozhia Industrial Sector
Mission: Surveillance of suspected bomb-manufacturing facility.

02:14 — |Facility detonated internally| causing structural collapse and secondary explosions.
02:16 — Extraction command issued directing team to return toward Brussels command staging.
02:18 — Seale deviated from extraction route alongside operators designated S, L, and P.

Operator S attempted return several days later and was arrested by NATO security forces.
Operators L, P, and Seale remain unaccounted for.

|Status: MISSING / POSSIBLE ROGUE ASSET|

^Medical Evaluation^
<blue>Physical Condition:<blue> Excellent operational fitness with no chronic injuries recorded prior to disappearance.
<green>Endurance:<green> Capable of extended overwatch exceeding 18 hours without performance degradation.
<ochre>Motor Stability:<ochre> Extremely low tremor index during firing tests; above Tier-1 sniper baseline.

^Psychological Profile^
*Baseline:* Emotionally stable with controlled stress response during combat.
*Behavioral Pattern:* Uses sarcasm and humor as a pressure-regulation mechanism.
*Command Relationship:* Historically compliant but demonstrates independent decision-making when civilian threat is perceived.
*Loyalty Orientation:* Strong personal loyalty toward teammates over formal command hierarchy.

^Other Intel^
*Combat Specialty:* Long-range precision engagement using .338 Lapua and suppressed designated marksman platforms.
*Operational Style:* Prefers single-shot confirmation rather than rapid follow-up fire.
*Field Reputation:* Calm, unpredictable sense of humor, extremely patient sniper.

<red>Assessment:<red> Subject possesses elite marksmanship capability and deep familiarity with NATO operational procedures. If active, Seale represents a highly capable autonomous field operator.
